embeds.title: Slime Trooper ( -178)
embeds.description: bit of checking and he seems perfectly accurate, evne against a 30 speed enemy, no problems with corpse enemies either, getting out of range either makes him not shoot or he hits the target \(this is not like demoman where it doesnt matter how far away he got, he will still throw\), unless theres some edge case where it actaully misses i think he is perfectly accurate

embeds.title: Slime Trooper ( -207)
embeds.description: tried to look into this again because i couldve sworn it has no damage drop off and yeah, still nothing. Regardless of the distance, 64. Even tried it against spotlight tech since uses same damage drop off as demoman and it has a very similar \(2\) spotlight radius, that had damage drop off on the same group of enemies, slime trooper didn't

embeds.description: Added info on damage drop off

embeds.title: Twitgunner ( +4)
embeds.description: Don't like that reasoning because towers we have towers like Saboteur being mostly removed then re-added, Juggernaut being mostly removed then re-added, Combantant\/Brawler being mostly removed then re-added or even Clout God not making it then getting reintroduced as Twitgunner \(but that also failing\). If I bothered there is probably more examples of this but I think four is enough.
